error: Factorio exited before creating the save when passed the unsupported --disable-audio option
root_cause: The shared retention harness passed --disable-audio to Factorio 0.14 even though the finite archive binaries do not support that option.
fix: Omit --disable-audio for the declared Factorio 0.13 and 0.14 target lines.
regression: Test-MIRPowerShellQuality requires --disable-audio to be omitted for Factorio 0.13 and 0.14.
candidate_implication: The 1.4.0 and 1.3.0 candidates require corrected retention reruns and fresh seals; no published version is affected.
